repos.rationale: Primary repo for this run. Research ticket — output artifacts (pitch deck information package) are written here. No code changes needed; this repo hosts the research deliverable.

Core product backend — primary evidence source for product capabilities described at category level (autonomous AI workflow pipeline, deployment automation, production inspection, enterprise security, analytics). No code changes needed.
Web application frontend — evidence source for user-facing feature categories (workflow management, deployment center, staging, analytics, administration). No code changes needed.
Legacy/deprecated NS frontend — historical context showing NetSuite-first product evolution. ERP functionality now embedded in Helix Global. No code changes needed.
Legacy/deprecated NS backend — historical context showing original workflow pipeline before Helix Global integration. No code changes needed.
Open-source NetSuite CLI tool (MIT) — evidence of OSS strategy and ERP integration foundation. Created by team member Luis Simosa. No code changes needed.
